testcase.name: test_email_status_custom_domain

failure.message:
AssertionError: mode=sandbox, full: {'configured': True, 'mode': 'sandbox', 'active_sender': 'noreply@email.notarychain.app', 'default_key_set': True, 'custom_key_set': False, 'custom_sender': 'noreply@email.notarychain.app', 'custom_domain': 'email.notarychain.app', 'note': 'Sandbox mode — add RESEND_API_KEY_CUSTOM to activate email.notarychain.app'} assert 'sandbox' == 'custom_domain'
- custom_domain + sandbox

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_supply_chain_custom_domain.py:135: in test_email_status_custom_domain assert data.get("mode") == "custom_domain", f"mode={data.get('mode')}, full: {data}" E AssertionError: mode=sandbox, full: {'configured': True, 'mode': 'sandbox', 'active_sender': 'noreply@email.notarychain.app', 'default_key_set': True, 'custom_key_set': False, 'custom_sender': 'noreply@email.notarychain.app', 'custom_domain': 'email.notarychain.app', 'note': 'Sandbox mode — add RESEND_API_KEY_CUSTOM to activate email.notarychain.app'} E assert 'sandbox' == 'custom_domain' E E - custom_domain E + sandbox
